name: Avi Loeb
summary: Harvard astrophysicist, founder of the Galileo Project, and chair of the UAP Science Advisory Council.
profileSummary: Harvard astrophysicist, founder of the Galileo Project, and chair of the UAP Science Advisory Council.
background: Frank B. Baird Jr. Professor of Science at Harvard University and former chair of Harvard's astronomy department.
inclusionNote: Included because he leads instrument-based searches for anomalous aerial and interstellar phenomena and chairs a scientific advisory effort concerning UAP.
